post.summary: Send the items to generate numbers for, and return the next valid available part numbers.
post.description: Get the next available part number. See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-the-next-available-part-number) for more details.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The ID of the company or enterprise that owns this resource and/or is making the request to Onshape.

skipPartNumbers.description: Comma-separated list of part numbers to skip creating new part numbers for.

items.description: Comma-separated list of part numbers to skip creating new part numbers for.

configuration.description: URL-encoded string of configuration values (separated by `;`). See the [Configurations API Guide](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/configs/) for details.

elementType.description: Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

numberSchemeResourceTypeId.description: Must be one of: `8c96700620f77935a0b2cddc`: Part Studio, assembly, or drawing, `29cd738cc6a8819fe84864e0`: Non-geometric items, `10f29fc285510ebc648108e6`: Standard content

BTNextPartNumberParam.description: Parameters for creating a part number.
